title: Shopping Cart & Checkout
description: Enable customers to add products to a cart, review their order, apply discount codes, and complete a secure checkout with multiple payment options.

requirements.description: Customers must be able to add, update the quantity of, and remove products from their cart.
The cart must persist across sessions for signed-in users.
Customers must be able to apply a valid discount code and see the updated total.
The checkout flow must support credit card, PayPal, and store-credit payment methods.
The system must recalculate taxes and shipping based on the delivery address.
An order confirmation email must be sent after a successful purchase.
The checkout API must prevent overselling by validating stock at payment time.
